---
title: "News"
---

## Event Calendar

<div style="
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto 50px auto;
  border-radius: 22px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  overflow: hidden;
">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div style="
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0066a1, #37a0d8);
    padding: 25px;
    text-align:center;
    color:white;
  ">
    
  </div>

  <!-- Calendar -->
  <iframe 
    src="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/embed?src=62dd7a1dd639f8ed7ce379a2615f89a34beecd482fc5153b2d3d4a5b91f0d889%40group.calendar.google.com&ctz=America%2FNew_York"
    style="border:0; width:100%; height:900px; display:block;"
    frameborder="0"
    scrolling="no"
  ></iframe>

</div>

## Upcoming Events

Add updates here, such as conference presentations, publications, awards, workshops, and outreach activities.

## Past Events
